items.note: For the wall behind the desk. It sets a tone.
items.alt_text: a woven basket on a table
items.description: Showcase your appreciation for the iconic television series with this museum-quality 'breaking bad' artwork by artist Gunawan RB. This piece captures the show's essence, featuring stylized representations of the main characters in their signature yellow hazmat suits, alongside radioactive waste barrels. Printed using state-of-the-art giclée technology with fade-resistant latex inks, this wall art guarantees vibrant colors and razor-sharp detail, making it a stunning focal point for any room. Available in various formats—from gallery-wrapped canvas to framed prints on fine art paper—you can customize the presentation to perfectly complement your interior design. It arrives ready to hang, simplifying the process of transforming your home, office, or rental space into an environment with sophisticated, personal style.
key_features: Artwork based on the TV show 'Breaking Bad'
Features high-resolution digital images and eco-friendly, fade-resistant latex inks
Available in Canvas, Framed Canvas, Framed Print, and Unframed Print options
The selected variant is a Framed Canvas with Champagne Silver finish
Arrives with pre-installed hardware for easy hanging

items.title: Breaking Bad: The Complete Fourth Season - Dvd [4 Discs]
items.note: The chemical record, sold by the season.
items.alt_text: Breaking Bad: The Complete Fourth Season DVD case cover featuring Walter White.
items.description: This is the complete fourth season of the critically acclaimed television series Breaking Bad, presented on DVD. The season follows Walter White's increasingly dangerous transformation into a criminal. The set includes 4 discs.
key_features: The phenomenon continues as BREAKING BAD hits a stunning new height with it's most suspenseful season yet!

In his multiple Emmy Award winning role, Bryan Cranston stars as Walter White, a one-time mild-mannered chemistry teacher whose transformation into a deadly criminal kicks into overdrive in the explosive fourth season.

As his young accomplice Jesse (Aaron Paul in his Emmy Award winning role) turns increasingly distant and hostile, Walt must deal with his estranged wife (Anna Gunn), his relentless DEA Agent brother-in-law (Dean Norris), and the ruthless kingpin manipulating the entire operation (Giancarlo Esposito) - culminating in a bombshell season finale that will leave you speechless.
BREAKING BAD is executive produced by Vince Gilligan and Mark Johnson.

items.title: Breaking Bad: The Complete Series Dvd
items.note: The chemical record, sold by the season.
items.alt_text: Breaking Bad: The Complete Series DVD cover
items.description: This is the complete DVD series of the acclaimed television show "Breaking Bad". It features the entire story of Walter White, a chemistry teacher who turns to manufacturing and selling methamphetamine after being diagnosed with terminal lung cancer. The series follows his transformation and the consequences of his actions on his family and himself.
key_features: Emmy(R) Award winner Bryan Cranston stars as Walter White
Down-on-his-luck chemistry teacher struggling to make ends meet
Uses chemistry skills to cook and sell crystal meth

key_features: The phenomenon continues as BREAKING BAD hits a stunning new height with it's most suspenseful season yet!

In his multiple Emmy Award winning role, Bryan Cranston stars as Walter White, a one-time mild-mannered chemistry teacher whose transformation into a deadly criminal kicks into overdrive in the explosive fourth season.

As his young accomplice Jesse (Aaron Paul in his Emmy Award winning role) turns increasingly distant and hostile, Walt must deal with his estranged wife (Anna Gunn), his relentless DEA Agent brother-in-law (Dean Norris), and the ruthless kingpin manipulating the entire operation (Giancarlo Esposito) - culminating in a bombshell season finale that will leave you speechless.
BREAKING BAD is executive produced by Vince Gilligan and Mark Johnson.

items.title: Breaking Bad: The Fifth Season
items.note: The chemical record, sold by the season.
items.alt_text: Breaking Bad: The Fifth Season DVD 3-Disc set cover art.
items.description: This DVD set contains the fifth season of the critically acclaimed television series Breaking Bad. Follow the dramatic transformation of Walter White from a mild-mannered chemistry teacher to a ruthless drug kingpin. The season explores his escalating criminal empire, the dangerous consequences of his actions, and the relentless pursuit by law enforcement, including his own brother-in-law. Executive produced by Vince Gilligan and Mark Johnson, this season showcases the character's descent into darkness and the complex moral landscape he navigates.
key_features: Bryan Cranston and Aaron Paul return in their Emmy winning roles of Walter White and Jesse Pinkman.
With Gus Fring dead, Walt's transformation from a well meaning family man to ruthless drug kingpin is nearly complete.
When he begins to make a killing in the Meth business, his murderous schemes are threatened by a new investigation led by his relentless brother in law Hank (Dean Norris).
Executive produced by Vince Gilligan and Mark Johnson, the fifth season charts the murderous rise of Walter White as he reaches new highs... and new lows.

items.title: Breaking Bad 101 (paperback)
items.note: The scholarship. Peer reviewed by the fandom.
items.alt_text: Cover image of a book titled 'Breaking Bad 101: The Complete Critical Companion' featuring stylized laboratory glassware and crossed staff stakes on a mustard yellow background.
items.description: This is the definitive companion book for fans of the critically acclaimed television series, "Breaking Bad." Written by esteemed critic Alan Sepinwall, this paperback compiles his insightful episode recaps from the show's run, augmented with fresh essays, updated analysis, and exclusive commentary sourced from the show's creators and cast, including Vince Gilligan. The book offers a deep dive into the narrative structure, character development, and cultural legacy of the show, examining everything from Walter White's descent to the series finale. The cover art, featuring illustrations reminiscent of laboratory equipment, reflects the thematic core of the series.
key_features: Ultimate companion for fans of Breaking Bad
Includes acclaimed episode recaps by Alan Sepinwall
Features new essays and updated commentary
Exclusive insights from creators and cast

items.description: Enjoy hot and fresh coffee for up to 12 hours with the Asobu Insulated 32-oz. Pour Over Coffee Maker. Crafted with heat-resistant borosilicate glass and a double-walled, vacuum-insulated design, this coffee maker ensures a bold, fresh-brewed taste. It features a reusable stainless-steel micro mesh filter, eliminating the need for paper filters. Made with food-grade materials, it's stain and odor resistant, easy to clean, and portable for use at home, work, or while traveling. The copper-lined double-walled technology also makes it heat resistant for easier gripping.

items.description: This 250mL Globe Scientific beaker is constructed from low-expansion 3.3 Borosilicate glass, offering superior durability and excellent resistance to thermal shock, making it ideal for laboratory use involving temperature variations. The beaker includes dual metric scale graduations for easy volume reference, conforming to ASTM E961 standards. Furthermore, it has a large white marking area for convenient identification and coding.

The unit boasts a large 40oz (1.18L) reservoir, making it convenient for washing larger vehicles like cars, trucks, and SUVs without frequent refills. Its stable design ensures it won't tip over during use, making the cleaning process easier and more enjoyable. It is compatible with both gas and electric pressure washers operating between 500-3,500 PSI.

items.title: Product Page – Dyson Car+boat Handheld Vacuum
items.note: If it can't be fixed, ask for Ed.
items.alt_text: A person using a Dyson handheld vacuum to clean a car trunk and a white surface.
items.description: The Dyson Car+Boat cordless handheld vacuum is engineered for powerful, versatile cleaning. Its compact and lightweight design makes it ideal for quick spot cleans, while the advanced Dyson cleaner head technology effectively removes allergens and pet hair. With up to 50 minutes of fade-free suction and two power modes, it tackles dirt and dust in hard-to-reach places with specialized tools like the crevice tool and brush nozzle. The whole-machine filtration system expels cleaner air, trapping 99.99% of particles as small as 0.3 microns. Comes with a 2-year warranty and lifetime Dyson support.
